libraryDescription:
This library, gui.TextFieldPanel, provides a panel containing arranged text fields as a GUI component.

In the standard VCSSL library GUI, GUI components are handled as int IDs, but the GUI component provided by this module is handled as theTextFieldPanel struct.

The TextFieldPanel struct internally stores resource IDs and related data, but you normally do not need to be aware of its internals becausefunctions for creating and destroying it are provided. Direct access to its members is not recommended.
Specifically, create it with the newTextFieldPanel function and destroy it with thedeleteComponent function.

This module also provides overloads of standard GUI library functions so that the TextFieldPanel struct can be handled almost in the sameway as in the standard library GUI.
For example, the mountComponent, setComponentSize, andsetComponentLocation functions are provided.

function0.name: newTextFieldPanel
function0.declaration: TextFieldPanel newTextFieldPanel(int x, int y, int width, int height, string labelText[ ], string defaultText[ ])
function0.parameters:
(int type) x : The X coordinate of the panel. 
(int type) y : The Y coordinate of the panel. 
(int type) width : The width of the panel. 
(int type) height : The height of the panel. 
(string[] type) labelText : The array storing the label text. 
labelWidth : The width of the label area. 
(string[] type) defaultText : The array storing the initial strings of the text fields.
function0.returnValue: (TextFieldPanel type) The created text field panel struct.

function1.name: deleteComponent
function1.parameters: (TextFieldPanel type) panelInstance : The text field panel to be destroyed.

function2.name: paintComponent
function2.parameters: (TextFieldPanel type) panelInstance : The text field panel to be repainted.

function3.name: mountComponent
function3.description: Mounts a text field panel onto another GUI component.
function3.parameters:
(TextFieldPanel type) panelInstance : The text field panel to be mounted. 
(int type) componentID : The destination GUI component ID.

function4.name: demountComponent
function4.description: Demounts a text field panel from another GUI component.
function4.parameters:
(TextFieldPanel type) panelInstance : The text field panel to be demounted. 
(int type) componentID : The destination GUI component ID.

function5.name: setLabelWidth
function5.description: This function is supported for compatibility. Use getTextLabelWidth.Sets the width of the label area.
function5.parameters:
(TextFieldPanel type) panelInstance : The target text field panel. 
(int type) labelWidth : The width of the label area.

function6.name: setTextLabelWidth
function6.description: Sets the width of the label area.
function6.parameters:
(TextFieldPanel type) panelInstance : The target text field panel. 
(int type) labelWidth : The width of the label area.

function7.name: getPanel
function7.description: Returns the component ID of the panel.
function7.parameters: (TextFieldPanel type) panelInstance : The target text field panel.
function7.returnValue: (int type) The GUI component ID of the panel.

function8.name: getTextField
function8.description: Gets the text field corresponding to the specified label.
function8.parameters:
(TextFieldPanel type) panelInstance : The target text field panel. 
(string type) labelText : The label text corresponding to the text field to get.
function8.returnValue: (int type) The GUI component ID of the text field.

function9.name: getTextField
function9.description: Gets the text field at the specified index.
function9.parameters:
(TextFieldPanel type) panelInstance : The target text field panel. 
(int type) index : The index of the text field.
function9.returnValue: (int type) The GUI component ID of the text field.

function10.name: getComponentSize
function10.description: Returns the size of the panel.
function10.parameters: (TextFieldPanel type) panelInstance : The target text field panel.
function10.returnValue: (int[] type) The array storing the size of the panel.

function11.name: setComponentSize
function11.declaration: void setComponentSize(TextFieldPanel &panelInstance, int width, int height)
function11.description: Sets the size of the panel.
function11.parameters:
(TextFieldPanel type) panelInstance : The target text field panel. 
(int type) width : The width of the panel. 
(int type) height : The height of the panel.

function12.name: setComponentSize
function12.description: Automatically adjusts the sizes of the internal components to match the current panel size. Use this when the panel size has been changed externally.
function12.parameters: (TextFieldPanel type) panelInstance : The target text field panel.

function13.name: getComponentLocation
function13.description: Returns the location of the panel.
function13.parameters: (TextFieldPanel type) panelInstance : The target text field panel.
function13.returnValue: (int[] type) The array storing the location of the panel.

function14.name: setComponentLocation
function14.declaration: void setComponentLocation(TextFieldPanel &panelInstance, int x, int y)
function14.description: Sets the location of the panel.
function14.parameters:
(TextFieldPanel type) panelInstance : The target slider panel. 
(int type) x : The X coordinate of the window. 
(int type) y : The Y coordinate of the window.
